firstname.label: Vorname
firstname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

lastname.label: Nachname
lastname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

phone.label: Telefonnummer
phone.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

role.label: Rolle
role.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

author.label: Autor
author.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Benutzerrollen' with the id `69d9f1389d64c3f691ecb8d3` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69d9f1389d64c3f691ecb8d3/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

last_modified.label: Zuletzt geändert am
last_modified.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

application_evidence.label: Anwendungsnachweise
application_evidence.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

attachment.label: Anhang / Dokument
attachment.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69d9f13e60220ce3295e28ad/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
